_comment: DEMO roster for the public landing-page status widget — a GENERIC sample fleet (xo + backend/frontend/data/infra, matching the quickstart and the how-diagram). It is NOT any real deployment. Used only to regenerate site/status.json via gen.sh; never wire the public widget to a real fleet (that would leak real desk names). Federated to the REAL product topology — a fleet-command broadcast channel (role=fleet-command, members=command targets, EXCLUDED from synthesis routing) + per-XO home channels whose members are the PARENT up-link — so the example mirrors what ships; the legacy single-binding STAR it used to be is the shape that hid the broadcast-channel routing bug.
